attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
     MAJOR_LINE.PRODUCT_KEY      MAJOR_PRODUCT_KEY
    ,MAJOR_LINE_PROD.BK_PRODUCT_ID MAJOR_PRODUCT_ID
    ,MINOR_LINE.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY MAJOR_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
    ,NBM.PRODUCT_KEY      MINOR_PRODUCT_KEY
    ,NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
    ,NBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
    ,NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
    ,NBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
    ,CASE WHEN MINOR_LINE.MAJOR_LINE_TYPE='MAJOR'THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END MAJOR_MINOR_FLG 
    ,SUM(NBM.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY)
    ,SUM(NBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT)
    ,NBM.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG /* Added part of True Demand */    
    ,NBM.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG             /* Added part of True Demand */       
    ,NBM.DV_CORPORATE_BOOKING_FLG     /* Added part of True Demand */ 
    ,NBM.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY /* Added part Q3FY22 March Release */ 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_BOOKIGS_MEASURE_CART NBM
    INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE MINOR_LINE
    ON  NBM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY =MINOR_LINE.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
    ON  NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY =NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE MAJOR_LINE
    ON MINOR_LINE.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY =MAJOR_LINE.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS MAJOR_LINE_PROD
    ON MAJOR_LINE.PRODUCT_KEY=MAJOR_LINE_PROD.ITEM_KEY
GROUP BY 
     MAJOR_LINE.PRODUCT_KEY  
    ,MAJOR_LINE_PROD.BK_PRODUCT_ID 
    ,MINOR_LINE.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY
    ,NBM.PRODUCT_KEY       
    ,NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
    ,NBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
    ,NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
    ,NBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
    ,CASE WHEN MINOR_LINE.MAJOR_LINE_TYPE='MAJOR'THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END
    ,NBM.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    /* Added part of True Demand */ 
    ,NBM.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG                     /* Added part of True Demand */ 
    ,NBM.DV_CORPORATE_BOOKING_FLG   /* Added part of True Demand */
    ,NBM.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY /* Added part Q3FY22 March Release */

SELECT 
BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
SALES_ORDER_KEY,
PRODUCT_KEY,
SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,
NBM.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG , /* Added part of True Demand */    
NBM.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG ,       /* Added part of True Demand */       
NBM.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG, /* Added part of True Demand */ 
NBM.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY /* Added part Q3FY22 March Release */ 
FROM 
$$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTR 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR
ON ( BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTR.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT =R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT )
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM
ON(NBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR.FISCAL_MONTH_AGO_MONTH_NUMBER)
WHERE NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='ERP'
AND NBM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY NOT IN (-9999,-8888)
AND NBM.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG = 'Y' /* Modified from CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG as part of True Demand */
